description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring broad, dark green, waxy leaves with lighter green edges, arranged in a rosette pattern. The plant is set in a simple, unadorned terracotta pot with a slightly faceted cylindrical shape. The top of the soil is covered with a layer of small, smooth, light-colored pebbles, adding a decorative touch and helping to retain moisture. The leaves are thick and upright, with some arching outward, typical of hardy, low-maintenance indoor species. The pot has a matte, earthy orange-brown finish, characteristic of traditional terracotta. There are no visible labels, handles, or additional decorative elements on the pot.
description: A broad-leaved green plant in a plain terracotta pot, topped with decorative pebbles. The pot is unadorned and the plant has thick, upright leaves.
description_view_0: The plant's leaves are seen fanning out with a clear view of the pebbles and the pot's faceted surface.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the plant's central rosette and the pot's smooth, matte finish.
description_view_2: The leaves appear more spread out, showing the plant's width and the even distribution of pebbles.
description_view_3: A balanced view of the plant's symmetry and the pot's simple, cylindrical form.
